articles.author: Christopher Lamb
articles.title: How the first American pope is reclaiming Christian values from the Trump administration - CNN
articles.description: Flying to Algeria at the start of his landmark Africa tour on Monday, Pope Leo had a choice. He could ignore Donald Trump’s extraordinary overnight social media tirade against him, or he could tackle it head-on. He chose the second option.

articles.title: ‘Avengers: Doomsday’ Trailer: Thor Battles Doctor Doom, Chris Evans Picks Up the Hammer, X-Men Back in Action in Thrilling CinemaCon Footage - Variety
articles.description: The 'Avengers: Doomsday' trailer revealed Robert Downey Jr.'s Doctor Doom battling Thor, Chris Evans back as Captain America and much more.
articles.content:
